title: aneilema ovatum
intro: Aneilema ovatum, also known as the yellow water lily or small water lily, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. Traditionally, Aneilema ovatum has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to treat conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wound healing and pain relief. In herbal preparations, Aneilema ovatum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
